channel.title: GitHub Objective-C Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Objective-C in GitHub

item.title: AFNetworking/AFNetworking
item.description: A delightful networking framework for iOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS.

item.title: react-native-maps/react-native-maps
item.description: React Native Mapview component for iOS + Android

item.title: realm/realm-swift
item.description: Realm is a mobile database: a replacement for Core Data & SQLite

item.title: openid/AppAuth-iOS
item.description: iOS and macOS SDK for communicating with OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect providers.

item.title: OneSignal/OneSignal-iOS-SDK
item.description: OneSignal is a free push notification service for mobile apps. This plugin makes it easy to integrate your native iOS app with OneSignal. https://onesignal.com

item.title: AzureAD/microsoft-authentication-library-for-objc
item.description: Microsoft Authentication Library (MSAL) for iOS and macOS

item.title: aws-amplify/aws-sdk-ios
item.description: AWS SDK for iOS. For more information, see our web site:

item.title: TimOliver/TOCropViewController
item.description: A view controller for iOS that allows users to crop portions of UIImage objects

item.title: CocoaLumberjack/CocoaLumberjack
item.description: A fast & simple, yet powerful & flexible logging framework for macOS, iOS, tvOS and watchOS

item.title: google/promises
item.description: Promises is a modern framework that provides a synchronization construct for Swift and Objective-C.

item.title: onfido/onfido-ios-sdk
item.description: A Swift client for the Onfido API and a collection of UI elements to capture photos of documents.

item.title: AliSoftware/OHHTTPStubs
item.description: Stub your network requests easily! Test your apps with fake network data and custom response time, response code and headers!

item.title: SDWebImage/SDWebImage
item.description: Asynchronous image downloader with cache support as a UIImageView category

item.title: getsentry/sentry-cocoa
item.description: The official Sentry SDK for iOS, tvOS, macOS, watchOS.

item.title: google/GoogleSignIn-iOS
item.description: Enables iOS and macOS apps to sign in with Google.
